description: Unusual and wondrous objects, trinkets, and oddities.
items: Puzzle Box
A mechanical cube that opens only to the clever.
Dream Catcher
A woven hoop that snares nightmares and lets good dreams through.
Music Box
A tinkling mechanism that plays a haunting melody.
Lodestone
A magnetic stone that pulls at metal and compasses alike.
Prism
A glass shape that splits white light into a rainbow.
Hourglass
A glass vessel measuring time with falling sand.
Tapestry
A woven hanging that tells a story in thread and color.
Cauldron
A heavy iron pot used for brewing and boiling.
Goblet
A footed drinking cup of metal or crystal.
Brazier
A metal bowl for burning coals or incense.
Inkwell
A small pot of dark ink for writing with quill.
Parchment
A sheet of treated animal skin ready for writing.
Cage
A barred enclosure for holding small creatures.
Satchel
A leather bag slung over the shoulder for carrying essentials.
Sundial
A flat plate with a shadow-casting spike that tells the hour.
